task_completion.description: Load both 1HRC and 1YCC structures into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL interface is open with '1HRC' and '1YCC' visible in the object list on the right side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Structurally align the two proteins and color them distinctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewer shows two protein structures overlapping (aligned) and they are rendered in different colors.

task_completion.description: Identify the heme group and its axial ligands (His18 and Met80).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The heme group and/or the residues His18 and Met80 are highlighted, selected, labeled in the 3D viewer, or there is a command in the PyMOL console selecting/showing them.

task_completion.description: Render and save a high-resolution PNG figure of the superimposed structures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A command like 'png ~/PyMOL_Data/images/cytc_conservation.png' is visible in the PyMOL console, or a file manager/terminal shows the saved image file.

task_completion.description: Write a plain-text report containing the RMSD, PDB IDs, conserved residues, and a brief analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a report saved to '~/PyMOL_Data/cytc_conservation_report.txt'. The text must include '1HRC', '1YCC', an RMSD value, 'His18' or 'Met80', and consist of at least 5 lines.

integrity.description: The agent used PyMOL to perform the alignment and visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI being actively used, not just a script being written or executed blindly.

integrity.description: The RMSD value reported is genuine and derived from the alignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The RMSD value in the report should match the output seen in the PyMOL console after the alignment command (e.g., 'align' or 'super'), and should be a realistic number (between 0.3 and 4.0).

integrity.description: The analysis report is originally written and not just a copy-paste of the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the report should contain original analysis sentences rather than verbatim text from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB IDs: 1HRC (horse heart cytochrome c) and 1YCC (yeast iso-1-cytochrome c). Axial ligands: His18 and Met80. The RMSD of the structural alignment should be between 0.3 and 4.0. The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/cytc_conservation.png (min 30000 bytes). The report must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/cytc_conservation_report.txt and contain at least 5 lines.
